message:
test(labruntime): port 14 restore_layout tests to RuntimeFixture (ft-22x4r)

Port all 14 #[tokio::test] functions from restore_layout.rs to
asupersync-based RuntimeFixture for deterministic async testing.
Covers single pane, splits (horizontal, vertical, 3-way), complex
topologies (L-shape, grid, deeply nested), multiple tabs/windows,
active pane selection, empty snapshots, pane ID map completeness,
CWD restoration from file URIs, and skip-CWD config.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
